Friday Fifteen: June 1st Edition

June 1, 2012

Each Friday I am going to attempt to give you high quality reading material for the weekend, in the form of fifteen links from the previous week.

Here we go – I hope you enjoy:

Technology/Business/Productivity

  • Bored In The Office: Is It The New Productivity Killer?
  • The Unimportance of Practically Everything
  • Workplace experiments: A month to yourself
  • Cleaning Up Your Dirt
  • Stop Trying
  • The Little Guide to Contentedness
  • The Facebook Fallacy

Politics

  • Mega-donors: Quit picking on us
  • The 1 Percent’s Problem
  • The Return Of The Morning Grumpy – 5/30/12
  • Economically, Obama Is No Jimmy Carter
  • Right-Wing Billionaires Behind Mitt Romney
  • Austerity Recovery, Continued
  • Why New York City’s Big Gulp ban could be a big success
  • The Simple, Inexpensive Breakthrough That Is Transforming American Cities

Let me know what you think!
